Term Sheet for Series B Funding

Issuer: Quantum Leap Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12QQ9876P)
Investor: Future Vision Capital LLC
Amount: SGD 5,000,000
Pre-Money Valuation: SGD 20,000,000
Shares Offered: 500,000 Series B Preferred Shares

Contact Person: Mr. Alex Tan (NRIC: S8765432B)
Email: alex.tan@quantumleap.sg
Phone: +65 6789 1234

Closing Date: March 31, 2024

Board Representation: Dr. Emily Chen to join the board as an observer

Please note this term sheet is non-binding and subject to further negotiation and due diligence.
